name: gptaria-mcp
description: Post a project brief & publish cases on GPTaria from Claude Code, Cursor or Windsurf.
long_description: MCP server for GPTaria — an informational platform (SaaS) where clients post project briefs and builders answer with working prototypes. From your AI assistant (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf) you can publish a project brief, add clarifications, respond with a prototype, publish portfolio cases, and edit your public profile. A thin wrapper over the GPTaria REST API v1; all rules are enforced server-side. Use a sandbox key (gptaria_sbx_…) to test without persisting.

gptaria_api_key.title: GPTaria API key
gptaria_api_key.description: From Settings → API keys. A gptaria_sbx_… key is safe for testing.

gptaria_base_url.title: Base URL
gptaria_base_url.description: Override the platform base URL (self-hosted / testing).
